scripts.dev:cms: cd metaradio-cms && node scripts/ensure-env.js && node scripts/ensure-native.js && npm run develop
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n cms,web -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev"
scripts.seed:cms: cd metaradio-cms && node scripts/ensure-env.js && node scripts/ensure-native.js && npm run seed
